|desc=As a child, Nessa encountered a {{p|Feebas}}, and encouraged it to grow bigger. She also requested if she could ride on it once it [[Evolution|evolved]]. Years later, Feebas returned as a {{p|Milotic}}, who fulfilled the request from earlier and let Nessa ride on it. This encounter prompted her to move forward with her goal to be both a [[Gym Leader]] and a model at the same time.

None of Milotic's moves are known.}}
